compatibility_policy.patch: Patch versions are fully compatible and must not require document migration.
compatibility_policy.minor: Minor versions must be backward compatible unless a schema entry explicitly marks migration as required.
compatibility_policy.major: Major versions may introduce breaking schema changes and require migration.
compatibility_policy.extensions: Extensions must be namespaced, registered, and isolated from core PRD sections. Required extensions must be declared in meta.schema_contract.extensions.

schemas.notes: 1.0.0 documents remain valid under later minor schemas because project_tracking is optional, but they do not expose first-class project tracking or external workflow references until upgraded.
Adds optional first-class project_tracking to the PRD framework while preserving backward compatibility for existing 1.0.0 documents.
Adds optional external_refs URI arrays to project-tracking records so PRD execution summaries can link to GitHub or other workflow systems without duplicating their live state.

extension_policy.required_extension_behavior: Agents and viewers must fail closed or ask for explicit support when a required extension is not recognized.
extension_policy.optional_extension_behavior: Agents may ignore unknown optional extensions but must preserve extension data during read/write round trips.
